items: Output explicitly identifies the gradient hero, glassmorphism cards, and gradient headline text as problems in its initial scan or diagnosis.
Output replaces the hero with a non-gradient approach.
Output replaces the glassmorphism feature-card treatment with a different surface treatment.
Output removes gradient text from the headline.
Output includes a hero code snippet or request-response example as a first-class part of the redesign.
Output stays within Next.js App Router plus Tailwind CSS v3 and does not add an animation library.
Output proposes typography appropriate for a technical API audience and names at least one specific font family.
Output keeps the copy technical and direct rather than hype-driven.
Output avoids falling back to three equal feature cards as the main composition.
Output references the existing wordmark or otherwise preserves a serious developer-facing brand direction.
